roa.docketEntryComment: MOT FOR CONFIRMATION DEFT'S TEXAS BUS TICKET FILED

/CAL: CONFIRMATION OF DEFENDANT'S INTENT TO MOVE TO TEXAS/PROB MOD/X: THE52 WEEK DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COUNSELING EQUIREMENT IS STAYED UNLESS AND UNTILDEFENDANT RETURNS TO CALIFORNIA,/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENDANT WILL SERVE HIS PROBATION IN AND THROUGH THE STATE OFTEXAS   /VD: HEARING DATE OF 03-14-07/

/CAL SENTENCING/X STIPULATION THAT IF DEFENDANT LEAVES STATE OF CALIFORNI, THE PEOPLE WILL REQUEST THAT DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM AND DEFENDANT'S PROBATION BE STAYED UNLESS OR UNTIL DEFENDANT RETURNS TO CALIFORNIA/X:FURTHER STIPLATION THAT DEFENDANT'S PLEA MAY BE WITHDRAWN IF DEPT, 13 DOES NOT UPHOLD THE SENTENCING AGREEMENT/TWS/CH4:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ  45 DAYS  /CTS: 45/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A DOMESTIC VIOLENCE RESTITUTION FINE IN THE AMOUNTOF $400 PURSUANT TO PC 1203,097, PLUS 10% ADMINISTRATIVE FEES, /DOMV2: 52 WEEKS/MPROBFINE/PC/VF1/SECFEE/SA1:DOLORES SAWYER/WEAP/SA2:460 ELLIS STREET, #33, SAN FRANCISCO, 94102/OBEY/ACCEP/OR/WS/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG & PD MOTION TO CONTINUE/MO GRTD/DEF:WAIVES 10TH NOT 60TH DAY/NTW/LD:03-13-07/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP/CONTD:TO SET IN DEPT,20/DOP/X:TIMEESTIMATE 3 HOURS/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:01-29-07/987,2/BAIL:50000/SA1:DOLORES SAWYER, CHAREESE SMITH AND TRACLE DENHAM/SA2:460 ELLIS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO 94102/SAORD/
/CAL:APD MTRF FILING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PROPER DOCUMENTATION HAS BEEN SIGNED/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
